name: random-chat
description: Random chat application with text, voice, and video capabilities

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.predev: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('./client/.env'))console.warn('⚠️ client/.env not found — copy from .env.example');if(!fs.existsSync('./server/.env'))console.warn('⚠️ server/.env not found — copy from .env.example');"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.serve:prod: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src='client/build';const dest='server/client/build';const fsp=fs.promises;async function copy(s,d){const st=await fsp.stat(s);if(st.isDirectory()){await fsp.mkdir(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of await fsp.readdir(s)){await copy(path.join(s,e),path.join(d,e));}}else{await fsp.mkdir(path.dirname(d),{recursive:true});await fsp.copyFile(s,d);}}(async()=>{if(fs.existsSync(dest)) {const rm=fs.rmSync||fs.rmdirSync; try{rm(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});}catch(e){}}await copy(src,dest);})().then(()=>console.log('Static build copied.')).catch(e=>{console.error(e);process.exit(1);});" && npm start
scripts.full: npm run install-all && npm run serve:prod
